name: The Pain
description: Experience the painful reality of maintaining business rules across multiple systems
author: ERB Team

scenes.prompt: You're the developer. What threshold should we use for VIP status?

choices.name: $100 Threshold
choices.description: Customers with over $100 in sales are VIPs

scenes.title: The Pain is Real
scenes.summary:
4 hours of work, 4 systems updated manually, and a high risk that one got missed. Every time the rule changes, the whole process repeats. This is the pain of duplicated business logic.

What if you only had to define the rule ONCE?

That's what SSOT (Single Source of Truth) is all about.
lessons: Same rule, defined 4 times = 4x the maintenance
Every rule change requires updating ALL implementations
Risk of inconsistency grows with each copy
Time cost multiplies with each language/system

choices.name: $500 Threshold
choices.description: Customers with over $500 in sales are VIPs

title: The Pain
